videos.headline: Shedeur Sanders gets picked off on first play of the game
videos.description: Colorado's Shedeur Sanders gets picked off by Utah's Lander Barton on the first play of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Shedeur Sanders gets picked off on first play of the game) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Shedeur Sanders throws a 40-yard TD pass to Will Sheppard
videos.description: Shedeur Sanders throws a 40-yard touchdown pass to Will Sheppard to give Colorado a 7-3 lead in the first quarter vs. Utah.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Shedeur Sanders throws a 40-yard TD pass to Will Sheppard) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Colorado's LaJohntay Wester stuns with a 76-yard punt return touchdown
videos.description: LaJohntay Wester scores a 76-yard punt return touchdown to give Colorado a 14-3 early lead vs. Utah.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Colorado's LaJohntay Wester stuns with a 76-yard punt return touchdown) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Colorado's Will Sheppard scores his 2nd TD of game
videos.description: Shedeur Sanders throws a 6-yard touchdown to Will Sheppard to extend the Buffaloes' lead to 21-6 vs. Utah.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Colorado's Will Sheppard scores his 2nd TD of game) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Nikhai Hill-Green's interception sets up a Colorado touchdown
videos.description: Nikhai Hill-Green picks off Utah's Isaac Wilson, setting up a 37-yard touchdown for Isaiah Augustave to take a 28-9 lead vs. Utah.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nikhai Hill-Green's interception sets up a Colorado touchdown) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Utah's Isaac Wilson throws a 40-yard TD to Dorian Singer
videos.description: Isaac Wilson throws a 40-yard touchdown pass to Dorian Singer to bring the Utes closer 28-16 vs. Colorado.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Utah's Isaac Wilson throws a 40-yard TD to Dorian Singer) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Shedeur Sanders throws a 47-yard touchdown to Drelon Miller
videos.description: Shedeur Sanders throws a deep 47-yard touchdown pass to Drelon Miller to extend the Buffaloes' lead 35-16 vs. Utah.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Shedeur Sanders throws a 47-yard touchdown to Drelon Miller) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Travis Hunter grabs a touchdown for the Buffaloes
videos.description: Travis Hunter finds the end zone with a 5-yard rushing touchdown in the fourth quarter vs. the Utes.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Travis Hunter grabs a touchdown for the Buffaloes) 2024/11/16 ESHEET
